title: How do I issue a full or partial refund?
bodyHtml:
In the event that you need to refund a customer for an order they placed on Back Market, reference the following article to make sure you are refunding correctly. 
 

Where can I refund an order ?

You can refund an order in the corresponding after-sales request by simply clicking on 'Refund'. This will open a pop-up, where you will input the amount you want to refund to the client. Validate the refund after having indicated the correct amount. Please note that shipping fees must be included in a full refund and cannot be removed from the amount.

 
 

Full or Partial Refund?

In the event of a full refund, the order must be totally reimbursed, including: 

 

  • The amount of the order including all taxes
  • The shipping costs paid by the customer at the time of the order
  • Any other costs necessary for your customer to return the product

You can’t deduct the following costs from the refund:

 

  • Restocking fees
  • Return costs in case your customer refuses the package
  • Missing accessories - request compensation from the SSC in these cases

Two allowed reasons exist for withholding part of a full refund:

 

  • Degraded products returned for a change of mind (withdrawal)
  • Confirmed warranty exclusions

When issuing a partial refund, you will be able to choose the amount you want to refund.
 

  • For example, if the device costs €260, and you are allowed to retain €5, simply indicate €255 instead of €260

This same rule applies also if you need to refund only €10 for example. In that case, please indicate €10 in the amount to refund. Our system will automatically take into account that €10 was already refunded. If a few days or weeks later the full order needs to be refunded, the already refunded amount (€10), will be taken into account and not be billed twice.


In any case, clicking on a 'Refund' button will always open a validation page to check the amount and order. Unfortunately, once the refund has been validated it cannot be reversed. 
 

What happens if a refund failed for an order paid with PayPal?

Back Market will make a goodwill gesture at the seller's expense in order to refund the customer and inform both the seller and the customer in the service request discussion.
 

Where to view all refunded orders? 

You will view all refunded orders directly on the corresponding invoice. For example, on your invoice of November 26, you will see all orders refunded before November 26, starting on November 16 (last billing date).

You can also view all refunded orders in the Customer Care Insights Dashboard, available in your Back Office.
